description: A prepayment made against a PO before any invoice exists, driven by an advance payment term agreed at acknowledgement (e.g. 100% advance, part-advance + against documents). It is a prepayment asset that is recouped against later invoices: paid out early, then recovered by reducing the cash released on subsequent matched invoices until the advance is fully recouped. Build-add: implied by the source payment terms but not previously modeled.

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: Advance Ref.
fields.validation: configurable pattern; unique; immutable once created
fields.purpose: Stable key that ties the prepayment to its PO and forward to the invoices it is recouped against so the asset can be tracked from payout to full recovery.

fields.name: poId
fields.label: Purchase Order
fields.validation: PO exists; the advance is raised against an acknowledged PO with an advance term
fields.purpose: Links the prepayment to the order it advances against so recoupment is scoped to that PO's later invoices and the advance never over-recoups beyond the order.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: supplier must exist; inherited from the PO
fields.purpose: Names the party the prepayment was paid to so the outstanding advance shows on the supplier creditor ledger and is netted against that supplier's invoices.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master; inherited from the PO
fields.purpose: The advance currency; the base-currency sibling is FX-converted so the outstanding-asset figure and recoupment are normalized (axiom A12).

fields.name: amount
fields.label: Advance Amount
fields.validation: > 0; the prepayment value (a prepayment asset, not an expense)
fields.purpose: The prepayment value paid early per the advance term; carried as an asset until recouped, and the ceiling that total recoupment cannot exceed.

fields.name: recoupedAmount
fields.label: Recouped Amount
fields.validation: >= 0 AND <= amount; sum of recoupments netted against later invoices
fields.purpose: The portion of the prepayment already recovered by reducing cash released on matched invoices; drives the status from paid toward recouped and bounds further recoupment.

fields.name: outstandingAmount
fields.label: Outstanding Advance
fields.validation: = amount - recoupedAmount; >= 0; recomputed on each recoupment
fields.purpose: The unrecovered prepayment still carried as an asset; the cap on how much a given invoice's advanceRecouped can take and the figure the creditor ledger nets against the payable.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: requested -> paid (on disbursement) -> recouped (when outstandingAmount reaches 0); partially-recouped advances remain paid until fully recovered
fields.purpose: The lifecycle of the prepayment: requested when raised, paid once disbursed, recouped once fully recovered against later invoices. Gates whether the advance is still nettable.

fields.name: recoupedAgainstInvoiceIds
fields.label: Recouped Against Invoices
fields.validation: each invoice exists; appended as the advance is recouped against later invoices
fields.purpose: Records which later invoices the advance was recovered against so the recoupment trail is auditable and the same advance is never recouped twice against the same invoice.

fields.name: paymentId
fields.label: Disbursing Payment
fields.mandatoryCondition: set once the advance has been disbursed via a Payment
fields.purpose: Links the advance to the Payment that disbursed it so the early payout is traceable to a settlement record and its release gate.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.label: Created At
fields.purpose: Timestamps when the advance was raised; orders the prepayment-to-recoupment timeline for the audit trail.

invariants: A13 audit + SSE on every committed change
advance recoupment nets down the net release before disbursement (Payment netting)
